title: lepidium stephan-beckii
intro: Lepidium stephan-beckii, also known as Beck's pepperwort or Stephan's pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium stephan-beckii include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a raw vegetable or added to herbal remedies.
